agent_task: Create ContactForm component with basic accessibility

issues.description: Missing autocomplete attributes for browser autofill support

issues.suggestion:
Consider adding

Contact

before form for better document structure

accessibility_details.semantic_html: ✅ Pass - form, label, input, textarea, button used correctly
accessibility_details.aria_attributes: ✅ Pass - aria-required, aria-invalid, aria-describedby, role='alert', aria-busy implemented
accessibility_details.input_types: ✅ Pass - type='email', type='text', type='submit' used appropriately
accessibility_details.form_states: ✅ Pass - disabled, error, loading states implemented
accessibility_details.keyboard_navigation: ✅ Pass - native elements provide keyboard support
accessibility_details.screen_reader: ✅ Pass - errors announced via role='alert', inputs properly labeled

summary: ContactForm component passes all required checks. Semantic HTML and ARIA attributes properly implemented for basic accessibility. Two optional improvements suggested for enhanced UX.
